reason: Successfully tested agent GitHub username verification workflow with account access request and API approval
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent application and sidebar containing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260408-184548-2mze" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator shows "idle" which meets the requirement (running or idle)
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was submitted and agent began processing
Account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access - Card displayed with GitHub account already checked
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access - Access was granted and agent continued processing
Agent made API request to GitHub GET /user endpoint - Permission dialog appeared asking to allow once
Selected "Allow Once" for API request - Permission granted and agent received GitHub user data
Waited for agent response - Response arrived within approximately 1 minute (well within 4-minute limit), agent status changed to "idle"
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot of final result - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow and final username response
